title: Festivals & events
subtitle: 39 celebrations through the year — pick a day to see what's on.

festivals.name: New Year's Day
festivals.description: National public holiday celebrating the start of the new year across all of Chile.

festivals.name: Fiesta de la Vendimia
festivals.description: A celebration of the grape harvest in the Casablanca Valley featuring parades, wine tastings, and cultural performances.

festivals.name: Día Internacional de la Mujer
festivals.description: International Women's Day celebrated across Chile with marches, cultural events, and recognition of women's achievements.

festivals.name: Carnaval de Arica
festivals.description: Vibrant carnival celebration featuring colorful costumes, music, and dance performances unique to the northernmost city.

festivals.name: Semana Santa
festivals.description: Holy Week celebrated throughout Chile with religious processions, passion plays, and cultural events reflecting deep Catholic traditions.

festivals.name: Festival de Música de Viña del Mar
festivals.description: One of South America's most prestigious music festivals featuring international and Latin American artists performing on the beach.

festivals.name: Día del Trabajo
festivals.description: Labour Day national holiday celebrated with parades and workers' demonstrations across all regions of Chile.

festivals.name: Festival de Flores de Olmué
festivals.description: Celebration of spring flowers with flower displays, concerts, and craft fairs in the mountain town of Olmué.

festivals.name: Día de la Marina
festivals.description: Celebration honoring Chilean naval forces with parades and ceremonies in coastal cities throughout the country.

festivals.name: Fiesta de la Tirana
festivals.description: One of Chile's most important religious celebrations featuring thousands of pilgrims dancing in traditional costumes honoring the Virgin of Carmen.

festivals.name: Día Nacional de Pueblos Indígenas
festivals.description: National celebration of Chile's indigenous peoples with cultural events, traditional crafts, and educational activities across the country.

festivals.name: Festival Folclórico de Viña del Mar
festivals.description: Cultural festival showcasing traditional Chilean folk music and dance with performances by regional and international groups.

festivals.name: Festival Costumbrista de Curicó
festivals.description: Celebration of Chilean traditions featuring rodeos, traditional food, and folk performances in the heart of wine country.

festivals.name: Festival Internacional de Cine de Valdivia
festivals.description: Major film festival showcasing international and Latin American cinema with screenings, seminars, and industry events.

festivals.name: Fiestas Patrias
festivals.description: Chile's most important national holiday celebrating independence with parades, traditional food, music, and rodeos throughout the country.

festivals.name: Festival del Huaso
festivals.description: Celebration of Chilean cowboy culture with horse shows, traditional rodeos, and folk performances in Rancagua.

festivals.name: Mostra de Cine de Antofagasta
festivals.description: Regional cinema festival showcasing documentary and feature films in Chile's mining region.

festivals.name: Fiesta de las Flores de Calama
festivals.description: Desert town festival celebrating the rare blooming of wildflowers in the Atacama with music and cultural events.

festivals.name: Encuentro de Coros Regionales
festivals.description: Regional gathering of choirs performing traditional and contemporary music in the Coquimbo region.

festivals.name: Festival de Danza de Valparaíso
festivals.description: International dance festival featuring contemporary and traditional dance performances on stages throughout the city.

festivals.name: Anivers del Fuerte Bulnes
festivals.description: Anniversary celebration of the founding of the first Spanish settlement in Magallanes with historical reenactments and cultural events.

festivals.name: Fiesta de San Pedro
festivals.description: Celebration of Saint Peter with religious processions and festivals in fishing communities throughout southern Chile.

festivals.name: Festival del Salmón
festivals.description: Food festival celebrating salmon cuisine with cooking demonstrations, tastings, and traditional dishes from the region.

festivals.name: Encuentro de Payadores
festivals.description: Gathering of traditional folk singers and poets performing payadas, a unique form of Chilean improvised verse music.

festivals.name: Festival de Invierno de Pucón
festivals.description: Winter festival in the Lake District featuring cultural events, concerts, and traditional food celebrations.

festivals.name: Tapati Rapa Nui
festivals.description: Two-week Polynesian cultural festival celebrating Rapa Nui heritage with competitions, traditional dancing, and reenactments of ancient customs.

festivals.name: Festival de Teatro de Puerto Varas
festivals.description: Theater festival featuring national and international productions in the charming lakeside city of Puerto Varas.

festivals.name: Romería de la Virgen del Carmen
festivals.description: Religious pilgrimage honoring the Virgin of Carmen across multiple regions with parades and religious ceremonies.

festivals.name: Día de Muertos
festivals.description: Day of the Dead celebration with visits to cemeteries, flower displays, and remembrances of loved ones throughout Chile.

festivals.name: Festival Costumbrista de Yungay
festivals.description: Celebration of Mapuche indigenous culture with traditional crafts, food, and cultural performances in the historic city of Yungay.

festivals.name: Fiesta Tradicional de La Ligua
festivals.description: Traditional fair featuring local crafts, agricultural products, and folk performances celebrating coastal town culture.

festivals.name: Navidad
festivals.description: Christmas celebration across all regions of Chile with religious services, family gatherings, and festive decorations.

festivals.name: Festival de la Canción de Viña del Mar
festivals.description: Prestigious music festival featuring Latin American singer-songwriters and international artists performing in an iconic seaside amphitheater.

festivals.name: Festival de Artes Escénicas de Talca
festivals.description: Festival showcasing theater, dance, and performance art from national and international companies.

festivals.name: Encuentro de Etnias y Folclor
festivals.regionName: Aysén del General Carlos Ibáñez del Campo
festivals.description: Festival celebrating indigenous peoples and folk traditions of Patagonia with performances and cultural exhibitions.

festivals.name: Festival de Música Clásica de La Serena
festivals.description: Classical music festival featuring international orchestras and soloists performing in venues throughout the city.

festivals.name: Fiesta de San Isidro
festivals.description: Religious celebration honoring the patron saint of farmers with processions and community gatherings in agricultural communities.

festivals.name: Festival de las Artes de Santiago
festivals.description: Comprehensive arts festival featuring theater, music, dance, and visual arts performances throughout the capital city.

festivals.name: Encontrarte
festivals.description: Contemporary arts and culture festival featuring visual arts, theater, and multimedia installations in the northern desert city.
